titleStmt.title: SII 9.462: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 462. (A.R. No. 762 of 1916.) ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE OF THE GOVINDARAJAPERUMAL TEMPLE AT TIRUPATI, CHANDRAGIRI TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1389, Sarvajit, Pushya, śu. 1, Ā[divāra] corresponding to A.D. 1467 December 27, Sunday. It records the order given by the Sāḷuva Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Narasiṅgayyadēva-Mahā-arasu that the worship in the Gōvindarāja-Perumāḷ temple at Tirupati must be conducted on the same lines as those of Tiruvēṅgaḷanātha on the Tirumale hill and that Kandāḷa Rāmānujayya and his pupils should supervise the distribution of the prasāda to Śrīvaishṇavas, both foreign and local, in the Gōvindarāja-sannidhi and in the Rāmānujakūṭa (feeding-house) newly constructed at Tirupati by himself. It also records that the king established a Rāmānujakūṭa on the hill and fixed the scale of offerings to the god Tiruvēṅgaḷanātha, to be supervised by the same Kandāḷa-Ramānujayya and his disciples.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
stu . svasti śrīśakābda 1389 ra mēle naḍeva sarvajitusaṁvatsarada puṣya śuddha 1 Ā lū śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara mēdinīmīsaragaṇḍakaṭhārisāḷuva sāḷuva narasiṁgayyadēva mahāarasugaḷu tirupatiya stānikarige Aṭṭida kārya niṁma stāna ke gōviṁdarājadēvara prasādaprapāptiyanū tirumaleya mariyādeyale nāvellarū haṁcikoṁḍu jīvisabēkeṁdu nīu namage hēḷalāgi nāu pūrvāparavanu vicārisi kalveṭṭi pramāṇanū Ōdisi
gaḷanāthadēvara mariyādeyale gōviṁdarājadēvarggeU vayibhava naḍeyabēku nalku bageyavaru tirumaleya Ūḷigavanū māḍabēku gōviṁdarājadēvara naivēdya prasādavano tirupatiyavarige kāṇiparāgi nālku harivāṇaū naṁbigaḷige Oṁdu harivāṇaū pūrvadalū Ārōgaṇeya māḍuva paḍikaṭaḷeya Ārōgaṇeya harivāṇadalū koṭṭu mikka harivāṇagaḷanū tirumaleya saṁdhiya Aḍapinaviḷukāḍinalū haṁcikoṁbudu nā gōviṁdarājadēvarige makarasaṁkrānti puṁṇyakāladalu namma hesaralū hostāgi
vēdyada kaṭṭaḷage paḍavīḍarājya muppaḍuveṭu pūṁgoḍuvelada grāmagaḷalū Aramanege Etti baha jōḍi śūlavarigaḷanū biṭṭu tirupatiya kerege mūnūru hoṁ nanū koṭu kaṭṭaḷeyanū māḍida nayivēdyake harivāṇa yippattārū Apapaḍi harivāṇa voṁdu tirukaṇāmaḍe 1 ke yaraḍara lekhadalū dēvara nayivēdya naḍavahāge kaṭṭaḷeya māḍida harivāṇada prasādada harivāṇagaḷa voḷage viṭṭavana viḷkāḍige harivāṇa Ārūvare Appaprasāda hadimūrū Akāḷiya prasāda
dhivanū namage dharmavāgi tirupatiyalū dakṣiṇatirupatiyalū gōviṁdarājadēvara sa(ṁ)nnidhiyalū nāu kaṭṭista śrīrāmānujakūṭadalū pratidivasagaḷalū svadēsi paradēsigaḷū śrīvayiṣṇavaragaḷige yikkuvahāge kaṭṭaḷeya māḍidevāgi �yo prasādavanū kaṁdāḷa rāmānujayyagaḷa śiṣyapāraṁpareyāgi naṁma rāmānujakūṭake naḍasi bahudu tirumaleya mēle nāu kaṭista rāmānujakūṭadalū tiruveṁgaḷanāthadēvara tirumajjanakālakke nāu kaṭaḷeya māḍida karpūra kastūri kuṁku
rivaṭi Āratiya karpūra Āḍake Amudu muṁtāda Upacāragaḷu naṁma sēveyāgi kaṁdāḷa rāmānujayyagaḷa śiṣyapāraṁpareyāgi cātāda śrīvayiṣṇavaru sēveya māḍi bahahāge nāu kaṭṭaḷeya māḍida prakāradali Ā gōviṁdārājadēvarige tirumajjanakāladalū naṁma sēveyāgi naḍasuvahāge rāmānujayyagaḷige kaṭṭaḷeya māḍidevāgi Avara śiṣyapāraṁpareyāgi naḍasi bahadu yidumodalāgi gōviṁdarājadēvaru Ārōgaṇeyanū māḍuva nayivēdyavanellavanū tirumaleya mariyādayale haṁcikoṁbudu tirunāḍu tiṁgaḷu divasa modalāda vayibhavagaḷanella
mariyādeyali naḍasikoṁḍu bahudu tirucānūra Aḷaghiyaperumāḷadēvarige nāu tiruveṁgaḷanāthadēvara bhaṁḍāradali kaṭṭaḷeya māḍida yaraḍu harivāṇa nayivēdyavanū naḍisibahudu tirupatiyalū pūrvadali tirupatiyavarige naḍeda sāmyagaḷanū pūrvamariyādeyale naḍeva hāge kaṭṭaḷeya māḍidevāgi nīvellarū tiruveṁgaḷanāthadēvaru gōviṁdarājadēvara sēveyanū māḍikoṁḍu sukhadalu yiruvudu śrīrāmacaṁdra .
Digital edition of SII 9.462 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
